SEARCH

All Classes and Interfaces

Class
Description
ActionsHandler
Controller class managing the interaction between the ActionsMenuView and Driver
ActionsMenuView
Class that provides a GUI for "Actions" and "About" in the menubar Implements the interface to provide genre selection functionality.
App
 
AppTest
 
CsvFileProcessor
Class that handles CSV file I/O operations, including parsing, exporting, and selecting CSV files.
Database
 
DatabaseConnection
Manages the database connection to the MySQL "sakila" database.
Driver
Class responsible for database communication and operations (model).
Film
The Film class represents a film entity with attributes such as title, genre, description, release year, and rating.
FilmDAO
Data Access Object (DAO) class that provides data access logic.
FilmHandler
The FilmHandler class acts as a controller in an MVC architecture, handling interactions between the FilmsView (UI) and FilmDAO (data access) classes.
FilmsView
The class represents the user interface for displaying and managing a collection of films.
FrontPage
The class represents the user interface for the front page of the application It provides the user with the application name and its features.
GenreComboBoxProvider
 
MainView
MainView class defines the main application interface, including the main frame.
MyList
MyList class handles operations for managing and exporting a list of movies.
MyListHandler
Handles interactions between MyList and MyListView, allowing the user to import and export lists.
MyListView
This class represents the view for the user's movie list.
Review
Model class representing a movie review
ReviewHandler
Controller class managing the interaction between the ReviewView and review data
ReviewView
ReviewView is a JPanel that provides a graphical interface for displaying and creating movie reviews.
TableViewer
 
UIManager
